🔧 UI-Verse Micro-Frontend Loader

Dynamic component loading with Shadow DOM encapsulation and isolated script execution.

⚡ Quick Start: Include the loader and initialize with a component registry

Basic Usage

<!-- 1. Include the loader -->
<script src="uv-micro-loader.js"></script>

<!-- 2. Configure and initialize -->
<script>
  UVMicro.init('/component-registry.json')
    .then(() => console.log('Components ready!'));
</script>

<!-- 3. Use components anywhere in your HTML -->
<uv-button variant="primary">Click Me</uv-button>
<uv-modal title="Hello">Modal content here</uv-modal>

Programmatic Registration

// Register components manually
UVMicro.register('my-button', {
  props: ['variant', 'disabled'],
  assets: {
    styles: `
      :host { display: inline-block; }
      button {
        padding: 10px 20px;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 4px;
        background: #4ecdc4;
        color: #1a1a2e;
        cursor: pointer;
      }
      button:disabled {
        opacity: 0.5;
        cursor: not-allowed;
      }
    `,
    scripts: [{
      code: `
        // Runs in isolated realm
        const btn = shadowRoot.querySelector('button');
        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
          console.log('Button clicked!');
        });
      `
    }]
  },
  template: '/components/my-button.html'
});

// Or register multiple at once
UVMicro.registerAll({
  'my-button': { ... },
  'my-card': { ... },
  'my-dropdown': { ... }
});

Loading from JSON

// Load individual component
await UVMicro.load('/components/uv-button.json');

// Component JSON format
{
  "tagName": "uv-button",
  "props": ["variant", "size", "disabled"],
  "assets": {
    "styles": [
      "/styles/uv-button.css",
      ":host { display: inline-flex; }"
    ],
    "scripts": ["/scripts/uv-button.js"]
  },
  "template": "/components/uv-button.html"
}

Configuration

// Configure before init
window.UVMicroConfig = {
  registryUrl: '/component-registry.json',
  realmTimeout: 5000,
  styleEncapsulation: true,
  debug: true
};

// Then include the loader script
<script src="uv-micro-loader.js"></script>

Shadow DOM Benefits

Components loaded with UVMicro are encapsulated in Shadow DOM:

  • ✅ Style Isolation: Component styles don't leak to host page
  • ✅ Style Protection: Host page styles don't affect component
  • ✅ Script Isolation: Component scripts run in isolated realms
  • ✅ No Global Pollution: Components can't modify window globals

Isolated Script Execution

🔒 Security: Component scripts execute in sandboxed iframes to prevent XSS and other security issues when loading third-party components. 
// Execute custom code in isolated realm
await UVMicro.executeInRealm(`
  // This code runs in complete isolation
  // No access to parent page's variables
  const secret = 'cannot leak to parent';
  console.log('Running in isolated realm');
`, { someData: 'passed from parent' });

API Reference

// Initialize with registry
UVMicro.init(registryUrl) → Promise<UVMicro>

// Register single component
UVMicro.register(tagName, definition) → Promise<UVMicro>

// Register multiple components
UVMicro.registerAll(components) → UVMicro

// Load component from URL
UVMicro.load(url) → Promise<UVMicro>

// Execute in isolated realm
UVMicro.executeInRealm(code, context) → Promise<any>

// Get component definition
UVMicro.getDefinition(tagName) → object | undefined

// Check if registered
UVMicro.isRegistered(tagName) → boolean

Browser Support

The loader requires modern browser features:

  • Custom Elements v1
  • Shadow DOM (closed mode)
  • ES6+ (async/await, Promises, Classes)
  • fetch API
📦 Polyfills: For older browser support, include the following polyfills before the loader: 
<script src="custom-elements.min.js"></script>
<script src="es6-promise.min.js"></script>
<script src="fetch.min.js"></script>
